name: General Openshell Worker Basic
description: A blueprint for general openshell worker basic.

name: General Python Defined Basic
description: A pure Python workflow compiled by mn-python-sdk into a MirrorNeuron bundle.

name: General Python Defined Advanced Deamon
description: A pure Python daemon workflow compiled by mn-python-sdk into a live MirrorNeuron bundle.

name: General Prime Sweep Scale
description: A blueprint for general prime sweep scale.

name: Divisibility Monitor Example
description: This is a simple long-lived MirrorNeuron workflow that keeps running until you stop it manually. Note: this uses native agents for fast simulation.

name: Slack Money Monitor Example
description: This is a long-lived, continuous MirrorNeuron workflow that monitors a Slack channel and responds to specific messages.

name: Financial Market Realtime Advisor Daemon
description: A live financial market advisor daemon that streams simulated market data, generates advice, and can optionally post advice to Slack.

name: Science Ecosystem Simulation
description: A blueprint for science ecosystem simulation.

name: General Stream Basic Daemon
description: A live-mode blueprint that continuously sends telemetry chunks between agents using MirrorNeuron stream messages until manually cancelled.

name: Infinite Drug Discovery Loop
description: This blueprint runs an infinite multi-agent loop for AI drug discovery, built on top of [BioTarget](https://github.com/homerquan/BioTarget). It demonstrates how to port complex ML pipelines into long-running, self-sustaining agent workflows using the MirrorNeuron runtime.

name: General Openshell LLM Codegen
description: A blueprint for general openshell llm codegen.

name: General Test Message Flow
description: A blueprint for testing general message routing and builtin actors.

name: Finance Market Observer
description: A blueprint for finance market observer.

name: Science Mpe Simple Push Visualization
description: A blueprint for science mpe simple push visualization.

name: Business Email Campaign
description: A long-lived email marketing blueprint utilizing Ollama and Gmail.

name: General Stream Live Backpressure Daemon
description: A never-ending live stream daemon that demonstrates bounded queues, propagated backpressure, slow agents, and retry-later external input handling.

name: Video Safety Door Monitor Daemon
description: A 24/7 door-camera monitor that samples live video, asks Nemotron 3 through Ollama whether a person is visible, and sends Slack alerts with cooldowns.
